generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics: Name: Confetti Random Direction Description: A button that shoots confetti in random directions when clicked, suitable for celebratory UI elements. Style: Interactions: animated, clickable Tags: confetti, animation, button Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): import { ConfettiButton } from "@/registry/magicui/confetti" export default function ConfettiButtonDemo() { return (
Random Confetti 🎉
) }
